seo.title: Inimel Lyrics in Tamil
seo.description: Full Inimel songs lyrics in tamil (இது மெய்யா மரத்துப்போனது என் நெஞ்சம் ...) sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Kamal Haasan, Singer(s): Shruti Haasan.
seo.keywords: Kamal Haasan, Shruti Haasan, Inimel full lyrics,  songs lyrics, Inimel lyrics snippets, Inimel WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Inimel lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Inimel?

The song explores themes of moving on and finding closure after a difficult phase.

Who wrote the lyrics for Inimel?

The lyrics were written by the renowned Kamal Haasan.

Who is the singer of Inimel?

The song is sung by Shruti Haasan.

When was Inimel released?

The song was released in 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Inimel is a soulful solo performed by Shruti Haasan, with lyrics by Kamal Haasan. It conveys the emotions of overcoming past struggles and finding strength to move forward. The melancholic yet motivational tone resonates with listeners who have experienced heartbreak. The song's lyrical depth and Shruti's emotive voice create a powerful impact, making it a memorable piece for those seeking solace and inspiration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the emotional depth of Inimel, a poignant solo by Shruti Haasan with lyrics penned by the legendary Kamal Haasan. This song captures the essence of moving on with its melancholic yet motivational vibe. Dive into the lyrical brilliance and soulful rendition that makes this track unforgettable.
stanzaMeanings: Hate me, is this true? My heart has turned to stone. Grab me, how does it feel? Walking alone on this chosen path.
If the bridge breaks, without seeing the shore, it will drift away.
From now on, from now on, from now on, this trouble won't be there. This is it, this is it, this is the end, I will say.
From now on, from now on, from now on, this trouble won't be there. This is it, this is it, this is the certainty, I will say.
... If time is lost, dreams won't come true. Who cares if we don't sleep.
If eyes close and die, every day what we see will become a dream.
From now on, from now on, from now on, this trouble won't be there. This is it, this is it, this is the end, I will say.
From now on, from now on, from now on, this trouble won't be there. This is it, this is it, this is the certainty, I will say.
Even if you remove the old and bring in the new, being born again is a great joy, happiness, happiness, oh.
I'm forever after I'm forever after From now on, from now on, from now on, this trouble won't be there. This is it, this is it, this is the end, I will say.
From now on, from now on, from now on, this trouble won't be there. This is it, this is it, this is the certainty, I will say.
